hypothesis: Profile the spaceship-titanic dataset to understand class balance, missing values, feature distributions, and identify feature engineering opportunities.
implementation_hints: Run on data/train.csv and data/test.csv in the competition root. Focus on: (1) class balance of Transported, (2) missing value counts per column, (3) Cabin parsing (Deck/Num/Side), (4) spending feature distributions and zeros, (5) CryoSleep correlation with spending (cryo passengers should have 0 spend), (6) PassengerId group encoding (format GGGG_PP).
